message:
chore(beads): Close bd-39j3 - rollback_workers() implementation complete

Real implementation with SSH-based binary restoration:
- Graceful process stop (pkill -TERM)
- Backup verification and restoration via cp
- Hash verification (optional)
- Service restart (nohup serve)

48 unit tests verify behavior via MockSshExecutor.
